description_long: This is a heavy-duty electric drill with a robust, industrial design, featuring a large cylindrical motor housing and a metallic chuck at the front for holding drill bits. The body is primarily gray with visible signs of wear, suggesting frequent use in construction or repair environments. A prominent side handle is attached near the front, providing extra stability and control during operation. The rear section includes a molded grip with a trigger area, though the trigger button is not clearly visible. The drill's casing appears to be made of a combination of metal and durable plastic, with some surface scuffs and discoloration. No visible power cord or battery pack is attached, and there are no clear brand markings or logos on the exterior.
description: A rugged, gray electric drill with a cylindrical body, metallic chuck, and a side handle for stability. The surface shows wear, and no power source or brand logo is visible.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the drill, including the main handle, side handle, and metallic chuck.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular chuck opening and the alignment of the side handle beneath the drill.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rear grip, side handle, and the back of the drill body.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the handle and the top of the drill, with the chuck barely visible.
